overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired city. The player moves along wet neon-lit streets, through a covered pedestrian walkway with purple lighting, and along a waterfront promenade with towering cyberpunk skyscrapers visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk street with neon signs and traditional pavilion architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: Asian-style pagoda structure with curved roof on the left side of the street
illuminated orange sign with 'HOLT' text on a building facade
tall multi-light street lamp post with bright white lights
tall cyberpunk skyscrapers with various neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, walking along a wet street lined with neon signs. A traditional Asian pavilion stands on the left while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead and vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with purple neon ceiling lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway with purple neon ceiling lights, becoming sheltered from the rain

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor with purple ambient lighting

entered.detail: wooden beam covered walkway with traditional architectural elements providing shelter
row of bright purple neon light strips running along the ceiling
blue illuminated benches along the left wall of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway sheltered from the rain, illuminated by vibrant purple neon ceiling lights. Blue benches line the left side as the camera moves through the corridor toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with elevated highway overpass in distance

events.description: exits covered walkway back into open rainy waterfront area with visible railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade approaching a food stall vendor

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the food stalls along the waterfront

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the walkway overlooking the water
large illuminated umbrella over a street food vendor cart with warm lighting
raised highway structure with red neon lighting spanning across the background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to a wide waterfront promenade exposed to the heavy rain. The camera walks along a railing toward a food stall with an illuminated umbrella, while an elevated highway with red neon lights spans the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront food stall and upward view of cyberpunk skyline

events.description: approaches and passes illuminated food stall with vendor standing under umbrella
camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and neon billboards against the night sky

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the massive skyscrapers and neon-lit skyline after passing the food vendor

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the illuminated cart under the umbrella

entered.detail: food preparation cart with bright yellow neon rectangular lighting and cooking equipment
vendor standing behind the food cart wearing casual clothing
dense cluster of towering cyberpunk buildings with multiple illuminated billboards and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a warmly lit food stall with a vendor under a large umbrella, then passes by and tilts upward to reveal the massive cyberpunk skyline. Towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays dominate the view against the rainy night sky, with the moon visible between buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk city, moving from neon-lit streets into a sheltered corridor and finally toward a towering waterfront skyline. It begins with a walk along a wet road lined with neon signs and a traditional Asian pavilion, with futuristic skyscrapers looming in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a covered pedestrian walkway where the rain vanishes and the lighting turns a vibrant purple. The scene then opens back into the heavy rain upon exiting the corridor, gliding along a waterfront promenade toward a warmly lit food stall under an illuminated umbrella. Finally, the camera passes the vendor and tilts upward to reveal a massive skyline of skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon displays beneath a rainy night sky.
